sentences.arabic: أَحْبَبْتُ السَّيْرَ فِي الطَّبِيعَةِ فَذَهَبْتُ إِلَى جَبَلٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنَ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Volio sam šetati u prirodi pa sam otišao na obližnju planinu.
sentences.translationEn: I loved walking in nature, so I went to a mountain near the city.

sentences.translation: Staza je bila poznata i namijenjena pješačima.
sentences.translationEn: The trail was well-known and designated for hikers.

sentences.arabic: مَشَيْتُ لِمُدَّةِ سَاعَتَيْنِ بَيْنَ الأَشْجَارِ وَالصُّخُورِ.
sentences.translation: Hodao sam dva sata između drveća i stijena.
sentences.translationEn: I walked for two hours among trees and rocks.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْقِمَّةِ وَرَأَيْتُ الْمَدِينَةَ مِنْ بَعِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Stigao sam na vrh i vidio grad izdaleka.
sentences.translationEn: I reached the summit and saw the city from afar.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمَنْظَرُ رَائِعًا وَشَعَرْتُ بِرَاحَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ بَعِيدًا عَنِ الضَّوْضَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Pogled je bio predivan i osjećao sam se odlično daleko od buke.
sentences.translationEn: The view was magnificent and I felt a great sense of peace away from the noise.
